parameters.jsonBody:
=JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 400, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Score this SaaS idea on 8 criteria (0-10 each). Idea: ' + $json.title + '

Criteria: market size, automation potential, pain intensity, competition (10=none), willingness to pay, profit margin, build complexity (10=very easy), market timing.

Reply ONLY with JSON, no other text: {"market":7,"automation":8,"pain":6,"competition":5,"willingnessToPay":7,"margin":8,"build":7,"timing":6,"summary":"One sentence in Russian"}' }] })
